title: China's economy maintaining general stability and steady progress.
section_path: China's economy maintaining general stability and steady progress.
section_path_text: China's economy maintaining general stability and steady progress.
summary:
Copper" settled at the lowest price in more than three months this week, marking a drop of more than 20 percent from record highs in May. By Michalis Voutsinas
China's economy performed better than anticipated at the beginning of this year, driven primarily by substantial growth in high-tech manufacturing. The National Bureau of Statistics reported a 5.3 percent increase in Gross Domestic Product (GDP) for the first quarter compared to the previous year, surpassing the 4.6 percent growth forecasted by a Reuters poll of economists.
